channel.title: Second-Brain on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Second-Brain on Arrans github.io

item.title: pbek/QOwnNotes
item.description: QOwnNotes is a plain-text file notepad and todo-list manager with Markdown support and Nextcloud / ownCloud integration.

item.title: oldany/dropmind
item.description: Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.
